title: Adam and Lillith One lifeform against the other
display_title: Adam and Lillith One lifeform against the other
wikitext:
[]: Adam & Lillith: One lifeform against the other             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Sun Jun 07, 2009 6:18 am I dont know if this question has been asked before. But I couldn't find it if it has so here I go:- Now I dont actally know if this question actually has an answer, but It's eating way at me... If Adam and Lillith are 'Progentor Entities' sent to planets to create new lifeforms. How come when both the White Moon and the Black Moon crashed into earth, only Lillith create life (ie humanity) What was the reason Adam wasnt able to create life? And it the Angels were created after Adam awoke during Second Impact (I asume, seeing as they were not around before then) But during S.E. he was ripped apart, how could he create Angels when he was effectively distroyed? I also dont understand How the lance of Longinus is suppost to work. it's used to control the entities, but who uses it? the life which hasnt evolved yet? I heard that it was to stop it progressing to that of a God. But if it created life, it is a God already? How can it be a God a second time? Any answers would be great, then again.. there might not be any answers to these questions... Thanks Peace & Love

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Jun 07, 2009 7:35 am The Spear of Longinus is a "fail-safe" device to enforce the will of the First Ancestors. Of particular relevance to the situation at hand with the Earth, where two Seeds ended up together on one planet, it was necessary that Adam's Spear took action to neutralize Adam, since a: there were two incompatible Seed types present (one with the Fruit of Life [Adam], and another with the Fruit of Wisdom [Lilith]) and b: Lilith's Spear was lost in the wreck when her Moon crash landed into the Earth (i.e. First Impact). The First Ancestors were determined that the two Fruits should never merge, as the the result would be a God. Thus Adam, who was, after all, here first, was basically screwed over, and Lilith's progeny were allowed to inherit the Earth. Read this if you haven't already: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29

[]:             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Sun Jun 07, 2009 7:54 am Ahhh!! thanks that made sense. i knew that 2 seeds shouldnt be on the same planet, but i didnt realise that life and wisdom were not allowed to merge. (man has wisdom but not the power of life... which is true for us now i guess, so it works) So Lillith and Adam even though can create life, on their own they are not Gods... i see. No enity or entities are allowed to become God as it is too much power for one being to have... interesting. (that's why in EoE Unit 01 is reffered to as having both and being a God... Wait a minute.. Is that the reason Shinji was able to stop 3rd impact? He was inside Unit 01, who is a God, with the power to stop it? I think i read the spears are kinda entities on their own, so i guess they can stop the progentor enities on their own, yes? I was thinking why Adam got screwed seeing as Earth was suppost to be his.. luckly for Lillith her lance was destroyed or lost i guess. Yes I have read that site, but it didnt seem to answer all my questions, thats why i came here to you smart people. Thanks SO much!!! Your awesome!! :)

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Sun Jun 07, 2009 9:50 am Consol_Elect wrote: i didnt realise that life and wisdom were not allowed to merge. (man has wisdom but not the power of life... which is true for us now i guess, so it works)

[]:             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Sun Jun 07, 2009 10:02 am Well there you go. I dont know the Genesis story verse for verse so ergo my ignorence. Are big letters bad? Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Sun Jun 07, 2009 10:34 am Consol_Elect wrote: Are big letters bad? Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jun 07, 2009 10:38 am Consol_Elect wrote: Are big letters bad? Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jun 07, 2009 12:39 pm Reichu posts wall of text in 3...2...1...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Jun 07, 2009 2:32 pm Why didn't Adam's lance subdue Lilith instead of Adam. Adam's moon was there first. Does a lance attack its own seed if there are two?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Jun 07, 2009 3:25 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Why didn't Adam's lance subdue Lilith instead of Adam. Adam's moon was there first. Does a lance attack its own seed if there are two?

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Sun Jun 07, 2009 9:58 pm Shin-seiki wrote: "Duel of the Seeds" i.e. Adam and Lilith fought it out, and Adam lost... However, alas, the CI does a pretty thorough job of shooting that down.

[]:             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Mon Jun 08, 2009 12:43 am TemporalKnight wrote: Consol_Elect wrote: Are big letters bad? Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jun 08, 2009 12:00 pm It doesn't seem like Adam and Lilith have instincts, or else the Lances probably wouldn't of been necessary in the first place. Even if they did, the figure Rei becomes is a fusion of Adam and Lilith, so any instincts Lilith had would be overcome by Rei's godlike personality at that point, and her apotheosis was accompanied pretty much by the sentiment that her life's purpose was to make Shinji happy.

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Mon Jun 08, 2009 4:14 pm AuraTwilight wrote: the sentiment that her life's purpose was to make Shinji happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 08, 2009 4:24 pm TemporalKnight wrote: Well put. That does pretty much sum up GNR. Shinji: Oh god Giant Naked Rei!!!! NOOO!! GNR: Crap I scared him...How about Kaworu! Better Shinji? Shinji: I hate people. Kill them all. GNR: Ok! GNR: Now are you really sure you want this? Cause there is still time for me to sort of fix things. Shinji: Yes. Keep everybody dead. GNR: Are you sure? Cause I know you and I think you are just being scared again...but if that's what you want. Shinji: You know on second thought, maybe you should just put everybody back. GNR: Ok! Instrumentality in a nutshell.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 08, 2009 7:52 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Adam's Spear carried out its purpose/duty of preventing the two Seeds from coming together

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 08, 2009 8:08 pm Yojimbo: That's how I understand it, even though it's not exactly fair since Adam was there first.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 09, 2009 12:11 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Adam's Spear carried out its purpose/duty of preventing the two Seeds from coming together

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Jun 09, 2009 2:37 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Adam was only woken up because some jackass Lilin pulled out the Spear. Not really a flaw in the design.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Jun 09, 2009 2:55 pm What dialogue, specifically?
